task: Key Interop — normalize ed25519 key format to raw hex

changes.summary: Updated TypeScript crypto module to use raw hex key format (matching Rust implementation)
details: generateKeys: now exports raw key bytes via JWK (base64url), converts to hex, saves as public.key / private.key (was public.pem / private.pem)
hasKeys: checks for private.key instead of private.pem
loadPrivateKey: reads hex from private.key + public.key, reconstructs ed25519 KeyObject via JWK (OKP/Ed25519)
loadPublicKey: reads hex string from public.key
verifyMessage: converts hex public key from SignedMessage.publicKey to JWK KeyObject for verification (was PEM)

changes.summary: No changes needed — already uses raw hex format (public.key / private.key)

interop.keyFormat: 64-char lowercase hex string (32 raw bytes of ed25519 public or private key)
